content:
# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:claude/claude-opus-4-6

## Summary

Reviewed all three changed files (service.rs, task_prompt_contract.rs, project_run_record_test.rs). The changes are internally consistent and well-tested. They address a real CommonMark ambiguity issue where 1-3 space indented continuation lines could be parsed as ATX headings. The solution correctly: (1) preserves nested list indentation through the extraction pipeline, (2) renders continuation lines with ≥4 spaces to stay outside the heading zone, (3) detects and rejects 1-3 space indented canonical headings in validation, and (4) restructures marker validation to avoid false "marker after section block" errors when early sections are missing. All 123 relevant tests pass. No bugs, safety issues, or significant correctness gaps found.

## Amendments

None.
